# Kyle Choi - Financial Data Scientist

> "I transform complex datasets into compelling narratives—from MLB swing mechanics to macro-economic portfolio valuation."

## About Me
Kyle Choi is a Financial Data Scientist, AI Agent Developer, and CFA Level III candidate. He specializes in building intelligent systems that bridge the gap between complex data and actionable financial insights. With expertise in Python, SQL, Machine Learning, and NLP, Kyle engineers automated workflows and predictive models that drive strategic decision-making.

Recently, Kyle engineered a Cash Scoring XGBoost model achieving 86% ROC-AUC and developed an automated Agentic Workflow for feature creation. He also built a transformer model to categorize bank statements with 95% accuracy. His work spans full-stack data analysis, interactive 3D data visualization (using D3.js), and deep-dive fundamental equity research.

Kyle is currently completing his Bachelor of Science in Data Science at the University of California San Diego (UCSD), where he has maintained a strong academic record with advanced coursework in Representation Learning, Econometrics, and the Mathematics of Finance.

## Core Competencies
- **Technical Skills:** Python, SQL, Excel, JavaScript (D3, HTML, CSS), R, SAS, Stata, AWS, Tableau
- **Methods:** Machine Learning, NLP, Time Series Analysis, Financial Modeling, Derivative Pricing, Agentic Workflows, Prompt Engineering
- **Domains:** Statistical Analysis, Data Visualization, Quantitative Analysis, Econometrics, Fundamental Equity Valuation
